title: Margie's testimony — 'not certain the boy is ready'
text: Three nights before the ceremony: 'I'm not certain the boy is ready.' One (1) sherry, quoted exactly - and between us and the sherry, pet. Knowledge, not yet publishable proof.

verifyRoutes.hint: Margie's quote is hers to keep. The doubt itself belongs to the man who said it - ask HIM.
